introSection: Juvelen (English: Juwel) is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Olive green track and sand yellow supports.

fullText:
Juvelen (English: Juwel) is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark.



Olive green track and sand yellow supports.
